analysis_result: Median unique genes detected per nucleus (snRNA-seq, 6 PNSTs; primary QC: nuclei with >=500 genes) = 1898 (mean 2290; IQR [980, 3246]; n = 50877 nuclei across 6 samples). Sensitivity: at >=200 genes threshold, median = 352 (n = 157554); at >=1 gene (all nonzero barcodes), median = 1 (n = 7261438). Per-sample medians at >=500 threshold: GSM6285488_M1677=1012 (n=7537); GSM6285489_M1933=1452 (n=6988); GSM6285490_M2372=2910 (n=12087); GSM6285491_M3048=3394 (n=7182); GSM6285492_M803=1372 (n=9583); GSM6285493_NF110=2248 (n=7500)
denominator_used: Primary denominator N = 50877 nuclei (barcodes with >=500 detected genes, aggregated across all 6 PNST samples from GSE207399_10x RAW matrices). Sensitivity: N=157554 at >=200 threshold; N=7261438 at >=1 nonzero gene.
assumptions_made: Provided matrices are RAW 10X (all 6.79M whitelist barcodes; mostly empty droplets) so applied >=500 genes/nucleus threshold as standard snRNA-seq QC; matrices oriented as genes x barcodes (verified by shape 33694 x 6794880); 'unique genes per nucleus' = count of nonzero-UMI genes per barcode; no mitochondrial filter, no scrublet doublet removal applied (paper may have used additional QC steps such as emptyDrops/cellranger-filtered barcode lists, higher min_genes cutoff, or doublet filtering); all features in features.tsv.gz counted as genes.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - GSE207399_10x/ directory; 6 samples (GSM6285488_M1677, GSM6285489_M1933, GSM6285490_M2372, GSM6285491_M3048, GSM6285492_M803, GSM6285493_NF110)
   - Each sample: barcodes.tsv.gz (6,794,880 barcodes = full 10X v3 whitelist = RAW/UNFILTERED matrix), features.tsv.gz (33,694 genes), matrix.mtx.gz
   - Matrix shape verified: 33694 genes x 6794880 barcodes

B. COHORT DEFINITION (filtering to real nuclei)
   - RAW 10X matrices contain the entire barcode whitelist (6.79M per sample) with mostly empty droplets; median genes/barcode across all 40.77M raw barcodes = 0.
   - Therefore, filtered to 'real' nuclei using standard thresholds:
     * 'nonzero': barcodes with >=1 gene detected (very permissive)
     * 'min200': barcodes with >=200 genes detected (common scRNA-seq threshold)
     * 'min500': barcodes with >=500 genes detected (common snRNA-seq threshold, used as primary)

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - n_genes_per_cell = number of nonzero entries in each column of matrix.mtx (genes x barcodes).
   - Computed via (matrix != 0).sum(axis=0) on CSC-form sparse matrix.

D. COMPUTATION
   - For each sample, load matrix.mtx.gz with scipy.io.mmread -> CSC; compute per-barcode nonzero gene count.
   - Apply threshold (>=500 genes) to keep putative nuclei; concatenate across 6 samples; compute median/mean/IQR.

E. RESULT
   Primary (snRNA-seq standard, nuclei with >= 500 genes detected):
   - Median unique genes per nucleus = 1898
   - Mean = 2289.61
   - IQR = [980, 3246]
   - Range = [500, 12677]
   - Total nuclei (>=500 genes, across 6 samples) = 50877

   Per-sample (>=500 genes):
  - GSM6285488_M1677: n_nuclei=7537, median genes/nucleus=1012.0, mean=1318.66
  - GSM6285489_M1933: n_nuclei=6988, median genes/nucleus=1452.0, mean=2011.21
  - GSM6285490_M2372: n_nuclei=12087, median genes/nucleus=2910.0, mean=2869.93
  - GSM6285491_M3048: n_nuclei=7182, median genes/nucleus=3393.5, mean=3379.59
  - GSM6285492_M803: n_nuclei=9583, median genes/nucleus=1372.0, mean=1625.88
  - GSM6285493_NF110: n_nuclei=7500, median genes/nucleus=2248.0, mean=2393.81

   Sensitivity across thresholds (global):
  nonzero: n_nuclei=7261438, median=1, mean=29.35, IQR=[1,2], range=[1,12677]
  min200: n_nuclei=157554, median=352, mean=952.65, IQR=[298,918], range=[200,12677]
  min500: n_nuclei=50877, median=1898, mean=2289.61, IQR=[980,3246], range=[500,12677]

   Sensitivity across thresholds (per sample):

F. CAVEATS
   - Provided 10X matrices are RAW (unfiltered; contain empty droplets across all 6.79M barcodes). Had to apply a gene-count threshold to identify 'real' nuclei.
   - Primary answer uses >=500 genes/nucleus (standard snRNA-seq QC); secondary thresholds of >=1 and >=200 provided as sensitivity analyses.
   - No mitochondrial fraction filter, no doublet removal (scrublet) applied; paper's reported value may use slightly different QC (e.g., cellranger's emptyDrops-based filtering, or a higher min_genes cutoff such as 1000; or exclusion of doublets).
   - No upper-bound filters (some barcodes may be doublets with very high gene counts; these are included).
   - Gene counts use all features in features.tsv.gz without removing ribosomal/mitochondrial genes.
